score_rationale: Medium confidence: 1 metric matched (L_simple), 1 unmatched (bpd not measured), 2 incompatible (FID/IS — undefined on MNIST). Partial training (500 vs 800k steps). Beat scaled target by 17.5% — within scaling law uncertainty band of ±20%, no penalty applied.

mechanism_correctness.basis: All 6 pipeline components verified: schedule, q-sample, L_simple, UNet, training loop, sampling

loss_trajectory.basis: L_final=0.0369 beats scaled target 0.04472 by 17.5%. Negative deviation = not penalised. Within ±20% scaling law uncertainty.

scale_adjusted_deviation.basis: No penalty for beating target. Intentional scale reductions (32ch, 500 steps) are documented, not errors.

unmatched_penalty.basis: bpd not measured (computable but missing). FID/IS excluded — incompatible with MNIST, not unmatched.

sir_confidence_penalty.basis: Mean SIR confidence 0.80 across 4 assumptions. Penalty = (1-0.80) × 0.15 = 0.03.

bpd_nll.status: UNMATCHED — not measured in this run
bpd_nll.how_to_measure: Compute VLB from model using Ho et al. 2020 Appendix A

FID.status: INCOMPATIBLE — InceptionV3 undefined on 28x28 grayscale MNIST

IS.status: INCOMPATIBLE — Inception Score undefined on MNIST

upgrade_path: Measure bpd via VLB → upgrades to high confidence
Run base_channels=128 → removes capacity scaling assumption
Compute MNIST-native FID → adds third matched metric
